---
title: "Muller Chen Blog"
subtitle: "台大經濟所 · 因果推論 · AI 工具 · Causal ML"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents:
      - posts/ai-tools/*.qmd
      - posts/causalml/*.qmd
    exclude:
      filename: "index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 6
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

::: {.hero}
# Muller Chen Blog

記錄 AI 工具探索與 Causal ML 的閱讀筆記。
:::

---


## 最新文章

:::{#recent-posts}
:::
